items.title: Summer League Notebook: Second-Round Picks and Undrafted Gems Who Impressed
items.body_excerpt: Summer League is one of the easiest settings to overreact to. The sample size is small, the competition is inconsistent, and many of the league’s top rookies either play limited minutes or shut things down after only a few games. At the same time, it can provide an early glimpse…
